EXTENSION.JMCMODLIB.CONFIG.CrashGuard.ba: Wylaczenie odswiezania jest najbezpieczniejsze. Zachowanie odswiezania pozwala oknu dziennika BaseLib dalej pokazywac nowe wpisy, ale pomija przycinanie starych wpisow, ktore moze wysypac RichTextLabel.RemoveParagraph.
Zachowaj odswiezanie, pomin przycinanie starych wpisow (eksperymentalne)
EXTENSION.JMCMODLIB.CONFIG.CrashGuard.cr: Skips CreatureCmd.Heal calls with a null target or zero/negative amount so other mods' heal patch chains do not crash while handling meaningless heals. When disabled, the original heal logic is fully allowed.
EXTENSION.JMCMODLIB.CONFIG.CrashGuard.se: Skips the native Sentry GDExtension shutdown call when the game disables reporting during modded startup, avoiding startup-stage native crashes on affected game versions. When disabled, the original game shutdown path is allowed when possible.
